Maintain Template List -> Maintain Template
Print Server -> View Printers
Printer -> Link Print Server

View Authorisation Transaction

Identify Context -> Maintain Hospital -> Select Hospital

rules.description: The Printer Logical Name is already defined
The name/description of a printer configuration must be unique for a hospital
The facility resource identifier must be unique
The facility name must be unique
Raised when an attempt is made to edit a facility that is not empty
Raised when the an operating room name is not unique in the theatre
Raised when an operating room identifier is not unique across impilo
Raised when an attempt is made to disable an operating room that is not empty
Raised when the theatre name is not unique in the hospital
Raised when the theatre identifier is not unique across impilo
Raised when an attempt is made to disable a theatre that is not empty
Raised when the ward name is not unique in the hospital
Raised when the ward identifier is not unique across impilo
Raised when an attempt is made to edit a ward that is not empty
Raised when the bed name is not unique in the hospital
Raised when the bed identifier is not unique across impilo
Raised when an attempt is made to edit a bed that is not empty
Raised when the room name is not unique in the ward
Raised when a room identifier is not unique across impilo
Raised when an approver Email is unique in the hospital
Raised when an approver details is unique in the hospital
Raised when name is not provided
Raised when surname is not provided
Raised when email is not provided
Raised when approver type is not unique
Raised when approver role is not selected
Raised when active not checked
Raised when deleting active approvers
Raised when more than 10

validations.summary: /// Validates the approver email is unique in that hospital. ///
/// Validates the empty bed if necessary. ///
/// Validates that the bed identifier is unique across impilo. ///
/// Validates the name of the unique bed. ///
/// Validates the name of the facility is unique in that hospital. ///
/// Validates that the ward is empty. ///
validations.conditions: !string.IsNullOrEmpty(oldWardIdentifier | roomRelationships != null && roomRelationships.Count > 0 | bedRelationships != null && bedRelationships.Count > 0 | medicalEventUtilisations != null && medicalEventUtilisations.Count > 0

validations.summary: /// Validates that the ward identifier is unique across impilo. ///
/// Validates the name of the ward is unique across a hospital. ///
